file_insights.changes: Added AuditLog model class with 12 fields and comprehensive documentation
key_features: Foreign keys to Organization (nullable) and User (nullable)
JSONField for old_values and new_values snapshots
IP address and user agent tracking
file_insights.impact: Enables system-wide audit logging for compliance and security tracking

file_insights.changes: Created security configuration file with command allowlists
file_insights.impact: Security policy enforcement for command execution

file_insights.details: Session 12, subtask 2-6 in progress, 11 of 73 subtasks completed

file_insights.changes: Created Claude settings with permissions and sandbox configuration

patterns_discovered.description: AuditLog includes extensive docstring with usage examples, notes, and design rationale
Uses old_values and new_values JSONField for before/after snapshots
patterns_discovered.value: Enables detailed change history and compliance reporting

patterns_discovered.description: Captures organization, user, IP, user agent, and metadata
patterns_discovered.value: Provides multi-dimensional audit context for analysis

patterns_discovered.description: 5 composite indexes on common query patterns (org+created_at, user+created_at, resource, action, org+action)
patterns_discovered.value: Optimizes read-heavy audit log queries at scale

patterns_discovered.description: Deliberately omits SoftDeleteMixin - audit records are permanent
patterns_discovered.value: Ensures audit trail integrity for compliance

patterns_discovered.description: log_action() classmethod for simplified audit log creation
has_changes and changed_fields properties for audit analysis

gotchas_discovered.impact: Allows logging of system-level actions without user context
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: SET_NULL on_delete ensures audit records persist even if user/org is deleted

gotchas_discovered.impact: Could lead to accidental empty JSON objects if not carefully managed
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Validate that old_values and new_values contain actual changes before logging

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No soft delete mixin intentionally omitted
gotchas_discovered.impact: Audit logs cannot be soft-deleted, only hard-deleted from database
gotchas_discovered.note: This is by design for compliance - audit records should be permanent

gotchas_discovered.impact: All indexes include created_at for temporal filtering, which is correct for audit queries
gotchas_discovered.note: Table will grow rapidly in production; archive strategy mentioned in docstring

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented comprehensive AuditLog model with enterprise-ready features
key_achievements: Complete model implementation with 12 well-designed fields
Immutable audit trail design (no soft deletes)
Support for JSON value snapshots for compliance
production_ready_features: Retention policy design mentioned in docstring

recommendations.recommendation: Create Django middleware or signals to automatically populate ip_address and user_agent
recommendations.rationale: Manual population error-prone; automation ensures consistent tracking

recommendations.recommendation: Add comprehensive tests for log_action() method with all parameter combinations
recommendations.rationale: Helper method will be widely used; edge cases must be covered

recommendations.recommendation: Implement archive strategy for audit logs older than 2 years
recommendations.rationale: Docstring mentions 2-year retention; implement cold storage migration

recommendations.recommendation: Create developer guide for audit logging across different resource types
recommendations.rationale: Ensures consistent audit logging implementation throughout codebase

recommendations.recommendation: Add database indexes monitoring to track audit log table growth
recommendations.rationale: Audit logs grow continuously; proactive monitoring prevents performance degradation

recommendations.recommendation: Implement query filtering to prevent unauthorized audit log access
recommendations.rationale: Audit logs contain sensitive information; access control needed

recommendations.recommendation: Create read-only API endpoints for audit log querying with appropriate filtering
recommendations.rationale: Enables compliance reporting and security investigation workflows
